title: AI-Powered Travel Itinerary
scenario: Create a travel itinerary for a 5-day trip to Paris, France. The itinerary should include daily activities, restaurants, and accommodation details. The LLM output should be in plain text format and must include at least 3 daily activities, 2 meal suggestions per day, and 1 accommodation recommendation.
constraints: Must include a daily activity for each day of the trip
Each day must have at least 2 meal suggestions
Must include a single accommodation recommendation

evaluationCriteria.description: The LLM output must include a daily activity for each day of the trip
Each day must have at least 2 meal suggestions
The LLM output must include a single accommodation recommendation
The LLM output must be at most 300 words
